name: Noront Resources Ltd.
summary: Noront Resources Ltd., a resource company, engages in the acquisition, development, and exploration of base and precious metals in Canada. It explores for nickel, copper, zinc, platinum group metals, chromite, iron, titanium, vanadium, gold, and silver. The company's flagship property is the Eagle's Nest project located in the James Bay Lowlands, Ontario. The company was formerly known as White Wing Resources Inc. and changed its name to Noront Resources Ltd. in July 1983. Noront Resources Ltd. was incorporated in 1980 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
